decisions.title_en: Anthropic publishes Project Deal: 69 employees + Claude agents transact $4,000 across 186 deals
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First documented agent-on-agent commerce trial at scale by a frontier lab; Anthropic published Project Deal April 24 detailing 69 employees with $100 budgets, 500+ listings, 186 closed deals at $4k+ value, plus the finding that more advanced models extract better outcomes ($2.68/item more for sellers, $2.45/item less for buyers) without losers noticing.

decisions.title_en: Musk drops 24 of 26 claims, including all fraud allegations, on eve of OpenAI trial
decisions.reason: Previously published on 2026-04-23 with title about $134B claim and demand to reinstate Altman / undo for-profit conversion. New info on April 25: Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers granted Musk's request to streamline the case, fraud claims withdrawn, only unjust enrichment + breach of charitable trust remain. Trial / jury selection begins Monday April 27 in Oakland. Substantive new development.

decisions.title_en: DeepSeek V4 confirmed running on Huawei Ascend 950 supernode; Reuters reports DeepSeek gave Chinese chipmakers exclusive early-optimization access, denied NVIDIA
decisions.reason: Previously published on 2026-04-24 covering the model release / pricing / 1M context. New info April 25-26: Huawei officially confirmed V4 fully supported on Ascend 950 supernode clusters and used for part of Flash training; Reuters scoop that DeepSeek deliberately gave Chinese chipmakers (Huawei, Cambricon) early optimization access while denying that window to NVIDIA and other Western silicon. Major geopolitical / supply chain story shift.

decisions.title_en: xAI quietly locks free Grok users out of Auto and Expert models after 4-day outage
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. After widespread Grok outage starting April 21 that lasted into April 24, xAI quietly removed access to its best Auto and Expert models for free-tier users on April 25, graying them out in the model picker. Distinct from prior xai-grok43-release coverage which was about the model itself, not access tier changes.

decisions.title_en: Sora app and web officially discontinued today
decisions.reason: Pre-announced March 24 and explicitly mentioned in our April 17 'openai-triple-exec-exit' briefing as 'Sora将于4月26日关停网页与App'. Today the timer expired; no new information beyond what was published. API still available until September 24.
Already published 2026-04-24 with full detail on $10B immediate / $30B milestone / 5GW Google Cloud deal.

decisions.title_en: Tesla raises 2026 capex to $25B+ for FSD/Optimus/Robotaxi
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-04-22 covering Q1 earnings beat and Robotaxi 12-state commitment. Capex raise is a downstream financial detail in same earnings cycle, not a substantively new development.

decisions.title_en: Google Cloud Next agent platform recap continues
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-04-22 with full detail on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform launch; recent coverage is recap.
Summit was held Feb 16-21 2026 — well outside the 5-day freshness window.

decisions.title_en: Broadcom 3.5GW chip supply deal with Anthropic
decisions.reason: Deal disclosed earlier April; >5 days old (today − event_date = 12 days).
